commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `oracle follow-up`, MCP `follow_up`, detached browser child-session finalization, `oracle-await`, session lineage fields, docs, and tests for continuing saved ChatGPT browser conversations.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: when `resumeConversationUrl` is set, the PR still routes through `navigateToPromptReadyWithFallback` with ChatGPT home as fallback, and the hydration helper returns successfully with zero prior turns. That gives a high-confidence path for an inaccessible saved conversation to become a fresh chat with misleading child lineage.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can make resume navigation fail closed and add regression coverage; separate maintainer judgment is still needed for the public API contract.

target.title: [codex] Add saved browser conversation follow-up API
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a public follow-up API for continuing an existing saved ChatGPT browser conversation without mutating the parent Oracle session.

- Adds `oracle follow-up <parentSessionId> [prompt]` with `--prompt`, `--slug`, `--wait/--no-wait`, and `--no-recover`.
- Adds MCP tool `follow_up` returning `sessionId`, `parentSessionId`, `status`, and `logTail`.
- Creates child browser sessions linked with `parentSessionId` / `followUpOfSessionId`, copying parent browser config while forcing follow-up runs out of Deep Research mode.
- Keeps follow-up v1 prompt-only and rejects new files/attachments with a clear error.
- Uses the detached runner/finalizer path for follow-up child sessions so browser work can survive client timeouts.

## Review Feedback Addressed

- Preserved existing MCP `consult` compatibility: local browser `consult` now blocks by default again.
- Added explicit MCP detached opt-in via `browserDetached:true` or `ORACLE_MCP_BROWSER_DETACHED=1`.
- Exposed `oracle-await` as an npm package bin and included it in package `files`.
- Wired browser child sessions into status/session lineage using `parentSessionId` / `followUpOfSessionId`.
- Added real browser proof for CLI follow-up, render recovery, `oracle-await`, and explicit detached MCP consult.

## Validation

- `pnpm exec vitest run tests/mcp/consult.test.ts tests/cli/sessionDisplay.coverage.test.ts tests/cli/browserFollowUp.test.ts`
  - 3 files, 22 tests passed
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm pack --dry-run`
  - build passed
  - package contents include `skills/oracle/scripts/oracle-await`
- `pnpm exec vitest run`
  - 137 files passed, 18 skipped
  - 1093 tests passed, 42 skipped

## Redacted Real Browser Proof

Environment: local built checkout at this PR head (`35c66c32`), normal Oracle manual-login browser profile, no files/attachments, `--browser-archive never`, `--browser-keep-browser`.

Parent run:

```text
$ node dist/scripts/run-cli.js --engine browser --model gpt-5.2-instant --browser-model-strategy current --browser-archive never --browser-keep-browser --slug pr-proof-parent-0604 --prompt "Oracle PR live proof parent. Reply with exactly: PARENT_READY" --timeout 10m
Session: pr-proof-parent-0604
Mode: browser foreground
Reattach: oracle session pr-proof-parent-0604
[browser] Acquired ChatGPT browser slot ...
Answer:
PARENT_READY

3m04s - gpt-5.2-instant[browser] - input 20 / output 3 / total 23
```

Parent immutability check, before and after follow-up attempts:

```text
690f96310ef4a32827d00d9d111dee78470c1592e5553502cb27cb195210e07e  meta.json
0959461543219978a35a20e02ffd63eef5dabd1c4d45832687154cd6e2925553  artifacts/transcript.md
```

CLI follow-up child session:

```text
$ node dist/scripts/run-cli.js follow-up pr-proof-parent-0604 --prompt "Oracle PR live proof follow-up retry. Reply with exactly: CHILD_READY_RETRY" --slug pr-proof-child-retry-0604 --wait
Follow-up session: pr-proof-child-retry-0604
Parent session: pr-proof-parent-0604
Conversation: https://chatgpt.com/c/6a21...63f9
[follow-up] Session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 status: pending
[follow-up] Session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 status: running
[follow-up] Session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 status: completed
Answer:
CHILD_READY_RETRY

20.7s - gpt-5.2-instant[browser] - input 23 / output 5 / total 28
```

Child metadata/transcript proof:

```json
{
  "id": "pr-proof-child-retry-0604",
  "status": "completed",
  "parentSessionId": "pr-proof-parent-0604",
  "followUpOfSessionId": "pr-proof-parent-0604",
  "browserUrl": "https://chatgpt.com/c/6a21...63f9",
  "transcriptBytes": 220
}
```

```text
# Oracle Browser Transcript
Conversation: https://chatgpt.com/c/6a21...63f9

## Prompt
Oracle PR live proof follow-up retry. Reply with exactly: CHILD_READY_RETRY

## Answer
CHILD_READY_RETRY
```

Status lineage proof:

```text
Recent Sessions
completed gpt-5.2-instant br/fg ... pr-proof-parent-0604
completed gpt-5.2-instant br/bg ... ├─ pr-proof-child-retry-0604
completed gpt-5.2-instant br/bg ... └─ pr-proof-child-0604
```

Render/reattach proof:

```text
$ node dist/scripts/run-cli.js session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 --render
Chain: pr-proof-parent-0604 -> pr-proof-child-retry-0604
Status: completed
Execution: br/bg (detached)
Artifacts:
- Browser transcript - /Users/pd/.oracle/sessions/pr-proof-child-retry-0604/artifacts/transcript.md (220 B)
Answer:
CHILD_READY_RETRY
```

`oracle-await` proof:

```text
$ skills/oracle/scripts/oracle-await pr-proof-child-retry-0604 0 1 5
oracle-await: pr-proof-child-retry-0604 - first 0s, then every 1s, cap 5s
  [1s] status=completed transcript=220B
READY /Users/pd/.oracle/sessions/pr-proof-child-retry-0604/artifacts/transcript.md
----- answer -----
## Answer

CHILD_READY_RETRY
```

Additional finalizer recovery proof: an earlier child (`pr-proof-child-0604`) hit a transient ChatGPT-generated error response. The detached finalizer performed recovery render attempt 1 at 5m, captured a 327 B transcript, and finalized the child as `completed`.

## Redacted MCP Detached Proof

Default MCP `consult` behavior is blocking again. Explicit detached mode was also smoke-tested through mcporter:

```text
$ CHROME_DEVTOOLS_URL=http://127.0.0.1:0 ORACLE_MCP_BROWSER_WAIT_MS=1000 pnpm dlx mcporter call oracle-local.consult ... browserDetached:true slug:pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604 --config config/mcporter.json
{
  "sessionId": "pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604",
  "status": "running",
  "output": "[mcp] Starting detached browser worker for pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604; client timeouts will not stop the run.\n[mcp] Waiting up to 1s for inline completion before returning session status.\n..."
}
```

Recovery:

```text
$ skills/oracle/scripts/oracle-await pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604 30 30 420
oracle-await: pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604 - first 30s, then every 30s, cap 420s
  [30s] status=completed transcript=214B
READY /Users/pd/.oracle/sessions/pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604/artifacts/transcript.md
----- answer -----
## Answer

MCP_DETACHED_READY
```

MCP session metadata:

```json
{
  "id": "pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604",
  "status": "completed",
  "mode": "browser",
  "detached": true,
  "transcriptBytes": 214,
  "answer": true
}
```

## Notes

Upstream already has `--browser-follow-up` for planned extra turns inside a fresh browser consult and API `--followup` for Responses API chaining. This PR covers a different path: sending a new prompt to an already saved/recoverable ChatGPT browser conversation as a separate child session.
target.author: pdurlej

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
